name: postcss-comments

1.0.0.name: postcss-comments

scripts.build: yarn clean && rollup --config rollup.config.js --bundleConfigAsCjs && yarn copy && yarn modify-dts
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run lint && npm run test

1.0.0.description: Postcss plugin to prepend or append comments to CSS rules

2.0.0.name: postcss-comments
2.0.0.description: Postcss plugin to prepend or append comments to CSS rules

scripts.build: pnpm clean && pnpm set-module && rollup --config rollup.config.js --bundleConfigAsCjs && pnpm modify-dts

description: Postcss plugin to prepend or append comments to CSS rules
